title: Command cloak
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Cloak}}
[[File:TsavongLah-NEGTC.png|[[Tsavong Lah]] with his command cloak|200px|right|thumb]]
'''Command cloaks''' were a variety of living cape that was worn by high-ranking members of the [[Warrior caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Command cloaks were connected to the recipient's body via claws that would grip onto their shoulder blades through cuts made into the flesh of a Warrior after their [[escalation]].

Such [[Cloak/Legends|cloaks]] were only worn by those Yuuzhan Vong who had attained the rank of [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] or higher.

{{Clothes-stub}}
